model_phrasing: gpt-5 family detected from the system prompt; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4

anti_goals.coverage: Every frame wall remains active by its recorded activation condition.

allowed: Read the rejected P9 throughput protocol and raw observations.
Create a scratch-only reducing probe under /tmp.
Freeze and run one improved A/A throughput protocol on exact commit 293dcdf2d6d0b274418bcca8461f7eb122e10c52.
forbidden: Edit product files, committed benchmark files, or prior evidence.
Optimize product code or compare a candidate.
Relax the existing 0.80 to 1.25 A/A band after observing results.
Merge, release, publish, deploy, push, or contact production services.

frame.human_confirmation_boundary: Only the human may change objective thresholds, the action envelope, merge, or release.

current_state.observed_failure: managed_ctx_exec B/A median throughput ratio 1.2910628169223395 exceeded the frozen 1.25 ceiling
current_state.claim_boundary: This is a method-stability probe, not product performance evidence.

questions_unanswered: Which predeclared throughput batch and repetition protocol produces stable A/A ratios for all three lifecycle rows?

assignment: Design, freeze, and run one reducing A/A probe that makes throughput stable enough for a later baseline-candidate comparison. Diagnose P9 variance from raw data first. Predeclare warmup, minimum timed duration or operation count, schedule, repetitions, aggregation, stationarity check, A/A band, and refusal of favorable reruns before observing the new results. Use the exact product commit in two independent archives. Return a replayable learning checkpoint; do not authorize optimization.

budget_and_stop_rule.stop: Stop after one frozen reducing protocol is observed once, or earlier if no defensible protocol fits the budget. Empty is valid only with a replayable trace.

hand_back_rule: Hand back immediately if the method needs changed product code, a threshold change, more than one observed protocol, or an unavailable system capability.

output_schema.required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
